posts.author: ECH (Emmanuel CHERIGIE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

I would like to suggest an improvement about conditional formatting.

What about a condition to highlight fields updated during a given period (ex: last x days) to ease their identification?

Happy to ear what do you think about
